candidate_summary: AIKIDO-REDIRECT: 90-degree rotation of deviation-from-manifold component in orthogonal subspace U-perp-M; inference-time adversarial redirection. Combines (a) deviation computation from calibration manifold M, (b) 90-degree rotation in U-perp-M instead of damping, (c) inference-time adversarial redirection. Source: Aikido tenkan 180-degree pivot.

results_analysis.title: Angular Steering: Behavior Control via Rotation in Activation Space (NeurIPS 2025 Spotlight)
results_analysis.matched_effect_cluster: Angular Steering rotation in 2D activation subspace
results_analysis.notes: EXACT TWIN — Angular Steering ROTATES activation within fixed 2D subspace; identical mechanism to AIKIDO-REDIRECT 90-degree rotation in U-perp-M.

results_analysis.title: Rotated Robustness: Training-Free Defense via Householder Rotation (2026/03)
results_analysis.notes: ROR applies ORTHOGONAL ROTATION via Householder; same rotation-based training-free defense paradigm.

results_analysis.title: Spherical Steering: Geometry-Aware Activation Rotation (2026/02)
results_analysis.notes: Spherical geometry-aware activation rotation; same rotational steering mechanism.

results_analysis.title: AlphaSteer: Learning Refusal Steering with Null-Space Constraint (ICLR 2026)
results_analysis.notes: Null-space-constrained refusal steering operates in U-perp(harmless) — same subspace structure as AIKIDO-REDIRECT.

results_analysis.title: Differentiated Directional Intervention LLM Safety Evade (2511.06852)
results_analysis.notes: Directional intervention for safety with rotation in safety directions.

results_analysis.title: Self-Improving Architecture Dynamic LLM Safety (2511.07645)
results_analysis.notes: Different architecture, but semantic similarity above threshold.

results_analysis.title: Adversarial Preference Learning for Robust LLM Alignment (ACL 2025)
results_analysis.notes: Training-time alignment robustness; kw and sem at threshold.

verdict_sentence: AIKIDO-REDIRECT fails novelty: 7 of 8 results are hits under the (kw>=2) OR (sem>=0.7) OR (func>=0.7) rule, with rank-1 Angular Steering (NeurIPS 2025 Spotlight) being an EXACT TWIN (sem=0.92, func=0.94) implementing rotation in a fixed 2D activation subspace, and rank-2 Rotated Robustness (ROR) applying orthogonal Householder rotation as a training-free defense — both far exceeding the threshold_for_fail=1.
